articles.author: Reuters
articles.title: DRC’s Ebola outbreak may be worst ever, Africa CDC says - CNN
articles.description: The head of Africa’s Centres for Disease ​Control and Prevention warned on ‌Tuesday that the Ebola outbreak in Congo could be the ​worst ever, saying that ​currently tens of thousands of ⁠contacts of those ill ​with the disease had not ​been traced.
